# Templates

Starter templates for common project types.

## Available Templates

| Template | Description | Tech Stack |
|----------|-------------|------------|
| React | React application | React, Vite, TypeScript |
| Next.js | Next.js application | Next.js, TypeScript |
| Express | Express API server | Express, TypeScript |
| Full Stack | Full-stack app | React, Express, TypeScript |
| Soroban | Smart contract | Rust, Soroban SDK |

## Usage

```bash
stellarpilot create my-app --template react
```
